author: Xbox
text:
Hit the Streets of Japan & Save Humanity | This Week on Xbox
This week we hit the streets of Japan in Forza Horizon 6 and save humanity in Directive 8020! Plus, Fortnite and Overwatch collab in an epic crossover event! Let’s jump in.
